=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable missingEffectError for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable missingEffectError for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Catch all errors with Effect.catchAll" ===

--- file:///.src/missingEffectError_returnSignature.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Data from "effect/Data"
import type * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

class ErrorA extends Data.Error<{
  a: 1
}> {}

class ErrorB extends Data.Error<{
  a: 2
}> {}

class ErrorC extends Data.Error<{
  a: 3
}> {}

declare const effectWithErrors: Effect.Effect<number, ErrorA | ErrorB | ErrorC>

export function testFn(): Effect.Effect<number> {
  // @ts-expect-error
  return Effect.catchAll(effectWithErrors, () => Effect.dieMessage("TODO: catchAll not implemented"))
}

// @ts-expect-error
export const conciseBody: () => Effect.Effect<number> = () => effectWithErrors

// @ts-expect-error
export const conciseBodyMissingServiceC: () => Effect.Effect<number, ErrorA | ErrorB> = () => effectWithErrors


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable missingEffectError for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable missingEffectError for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Catch all errors with Effect.catchAll" ===

--- file:///.src/missingEffectError_returnSignature.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Data from "effect/Data"
import type * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

class ErrorA extends Data.Error<{
  a: 1
}> {}

class ErrorB extends Data.Error<{
  a: 2
}> {}

class ErrorC extends Data.Error<{
  a: 3
}> {}

declare const effectWithErrors: Effect.Effect<number, ErrorA | ErrorB | ErrorC>

export function testFn(): Effect.Effect<number> {
  // @ts-expect-error
  return effectWithErrors
}

// @ts-expect-error
export const conciseBody: () => Effect.Effect<number> = () => Effect.catchAll(effectWithErrors, () => Effect.dieMessage("TODO: catchAll not implemented"))

// @ts-expect-error
export const conciseBodyMissingServiceC: () => Effect.Effect<number, ErrorA | ErrorB> = () => effectWithErrors


=== [D3] Fix 0: "Disable missingEffectError for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 1: "Disable missingEffectError for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 0: "Disable missingEffectError for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 1: "Disable missingEffectError for entire file" ===
skipped by default
